author: duncanmmacleod
text: pip install failing with missing descr.txt

author: duncanmmacleod
text:
I am getting the following error when trying to install `pycbc` into an empty virtualenv:

```
$ virtualenv-2.7 ~/opt/pycbc
New python executable in /Users/duncan/opt/pycbc/bin/python
Installing setuptools, pip, wheel...done.
$ . ~/opt/pycbc/bin/activate
(pycbc) $ pip install pycbc
Collecting pycbc
  Downloading PyCBC-1.7.6.tar.gz (2.8MB)
    100% |████████████████████████████████| 2.9MB 517kB/s
    Complete output from command python setup.py egg_info:
    No module named decorator
    Traceback (most recent call last):
      File "<string>", line 1, in <module>
      File "/private/var/folders/xh/jdrqg2bx3s5f4lkq0rf2903c0000gq/T/pip-build-AKcpFn/pycbc/setup.py", line 346, in <module>
        long_description = open('descr.txt').read(),
    IOError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'descr.txt'

    ----------------------------------------
Command "python setup.py egg_info" failed with error code 1 in /private/var/folders/xh/jdrqg2bx3s5f4lkq0rf2903c0000gq/T/pip-build-AKcpFn/pycbc/
```

I think [cbf09de](https://github.com/gwastro/pycbc/commit/cbf09deb1bfbb82537b680e23e4c378338d79646) broke the build because the `descr.txt` file isn't included in the upload to pypi.python.org.

author: ahnitz
text:
Please try the latest release 1.7.7 that I just put out. This should be resolved. Thanks for the report!

<https://pypi.org/project/PyCBC/1.7.7/>

author: duncanmmacleod
text: [@ahnitz](https://github.com/ahnitz), this new release works as expected, thanks for the quick turnaround.

author: duncan-brown
text: [@duncanmmacleod](https://github.com/duncanmmacleod) unfortunately this release is messed up. Please don't use it. I will make a new release soon.
